T0044.title: Application Submission
T0044.definition: Refers to the act of preparing and submitting application materials to a loan company or bank's system, typically occurring within the credit application process. This step marks the official start of a loan application. The application submission process can involve fraudulent activities, such as submitting fake materials like fabricated business bank statements, falsified personal income streams, or forged housing provident fund records.

T0044.usageExample: 这批料都养好了，今晚统一进件，争取一波全下。
